response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video for any vocal music. 2. Confirmed that the background music is purely instrumental throughout the clip. 3. Defined the scenes based on the streamer's activities: shop interaction, ATM usage, shopping for Shulker Boxes, travelling to farm, and farming/bee management. 4. Since no vocal music exists, all song-related metadata fields are set to null.
response.global_summary: The video shows a Minecraft stream where the player is managing their in-game assets. This includes checking a shop's 'Sell Tab', using an ATM to deposit money, interacting with a villager to purchase Shulker Boxes, and spending time at their farm, where they organize and breed bees and harvest melons. Throughout the video, there is light, instrumental background music. No vocal performances occur.

scenes.description: The streamer opens the 'Sell Tab' in a Minecraft menu, checks inventory items, and closes the tab. Instrumental background music plays.
The streamer walks out of the building, surveys the area, and walks towards the ATM building. Instrumental background music plays.
The streamer enters the ATM booth, interacts with the ATM interface, and deposits 700,000 Yen. Instrumental background music plays.
The streamer walks out of the ATM booth to the villager market, interacts with a villager NPC to purchase 3 Shulker Boxes. Instrumental background music plays.
The streamer walks from the market area to their own farm area, places down the purchased Shulker Boxes, and checks inventory. Instrumental background music plays.
The streamer checks chests containing various bees, preparing to manage them. Instrumental background music plays.
The streamer begins breeding and organizing bees using an apiary, shifting through chest contents to decide which bees to breed. Instrumental background music plays.
The streamer continues to organize bee inventory by moving bees into hoppers and checking their stats. Instrumental background music plays.
The streamer harvests melons on their farm and talks about the game's mechanics, ending the clip. Instrumental background music plays.
